whenToUse.summary: Showcases the entrepreneur's biography and origin story to build an email list and drive social media follows. Typically linked from email signatures and social bios. The thank-you page delivers the first email and pushes follow buttons - the personal-brand front door.
goals: Capture from email signature / social bios
signals: You are linking from a social bio / email signature
You want follows AND email together
doNotUseWhen: The business is product-led with no personal brand (use Homepage/Storefront)
You need a direct-response sale (use a sales funnel)

pageStructure.purpose: Tell the origin story and capture the email.
blocks: Origin narrative (Attractive Character backstory + flaws + polarity)
What you stand for / your mission
Opt-in form for the 'first email' or a free thing

pageStructure.purpose: Deliver the first email and push social follows.

copyFramework.script: The Attractive Character (DotCom Secrets: backstory, parables, character flaws, polarizing stances) told as an Epiphany Bridge (Expert Secrets); StoryBrand framing positions you as the Guide who was once the hero.
copyFramework.notes: Authenticity plus polarity build connection. The goal is a relationship (list + follows), not an immediate sale.

primaryPersonaResolved.label: The Funnel Architect
primaryPersonaResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: The Attractive Character (backstory, parables, character flaws, polarity)
primaryPersonaResolved.voice: Direct-response funnel mechanics; sequence the visitor from curiosity to conversion.

supportingPersonasResolved.label: The Expert Guide
supportingPersonasResolved.author: Russell Brunson
owns_scripts: Epiphany Bridge Script (Backstory > Journey > New Opportunity > Framework > Achievement > Transformation)
Perfect Webinar (Big Domino + 3 Secrets + The Stack + Close)
supportingPersonasResolved.voice: Belief-shifting storytelling; transfer your conviction in the vehicle to the prospect.

supportingPersonasResolved.label: The Story Brander
supportingPersonasResolved.author: Donald Miller
owns_scripts: SB7 BrandScript: Character > Problem (external/internal/philosophical) > Guide (empathy + authority) > Plan > Call to Action (direct + transitional) > Success > Failure/Stakes
StoryBrand homepage wireframe (header, stakes, value prop, guide, plan, explanatory, junk-drawer)
supportingPersonasResolved.voice: Customer is the hero; the brand is the guide. Clarity over cleverness; no dead ends.

ghlBuild.notes: Link this from every bio and email signature. Keep it evergreen and feature your current mission.
